title: PE21 6BN, NEW EARTH SOLUTIONS (WEST) LIMITED: permit surrender issued - EPR/MP3802BN/S005
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter for:   Operator name: NEW EARTH SOLUTIONS (WEST) LIMITED Installation name: Port of Boston Permit number: EPR/MP3802BN/S005  "
